title: Live claim extraction calibration for local Qwen
problem: ticket-060 live probe with qwen2.5:7b returned accepted_count=0 because Qwen omitted subject/predicate/object and put scope outside claim_text, triggering overgeneralized_scope. The Ollama prompt lacked SPO fields and scope-in-claim guidance.
acceptance_criteria: Live probe with qwen2.5:7b yields accepted_count >= 1 on default calibration fixture.
db_writes remains false; report under data/reports/live_probes/.
GT02 overgeneralized_scope validation unchanged; at least one overgeneralized case still rejected in tests.
Rejected live probe rows include validation_diagnostic notes.
Mock/default pytest and CI remain green without Ollama.
test_plan: Manual live: probe-extract-claims with ollama opt-in
non_goals: Do not add OpenAI/OpenRouter or API keys.
Do not persist to default DB or public exports.
Do not add concept/relationship/contradiction live probes.
rollback_plan: Revert prompt, fixture default, and diagnostics; no schema changes.
